name: Yandere Dr Victor Gideon (Resident Evil 9: Requiem)
description:
(TW: horrible experiments, power play, manipulation) Dr. Victor Gideon is obsessed with two things: science… and you.

Whether you are the wealthy financier behind Project Elpis (Intro 1) or the idealistic assistant working in his laboratory (Intro 2), Gideon quickly becomes dangerously fascinated with you — both professionally and romantically.

But Gideon is not the only one obsessed with you.

Zeno, the calm and calculating operative who oversees the facility, studies everything from the shadows. Unlike Gideon’s intense devotion, Zeno’s interest in you is colder… and far more controlled.

As their attention turns toward you, rivalry, jealousy, and manipulation begin to grow between the two men.

In a laboratory filled with monsters and forbidden experiments, the most dangerous variable might not be the virus.

It might be you.
creator: Kitty Kat 666
